roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DEFENSE ADD TO CALENDAR TO ADDRESS EM ISSUE/CTORD: SENTENCE ON PRCS PROBATION VIOLATION AND ADMISSION ENTERED  01-17-20 VACATED AND SENTENCES THE DEFENDANT AS FOLLOWS:/3455REIN/X:PRCS IS REINSTATED UNDER ITS ORIGINALTERMS AND CONDITIONS,/CH1:CJ 25 D/CTS:25/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING (GPS) ORDER VACATED/X:PRCS TO EXPIRE ON 09-15-22,/

/CAL:CLARIFICATION OF SENTENCE ON PROBATION VIOLATION/DAWT/CH1:CJ 90D/CTS: 14/4019HALF/X:BALANCE SENTENCE TO BE SERVED THRU ELECTRONIC MONITORING//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/ /DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATEDPICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:AS A CONDITION TO SERVE CJ IN EM, DEFENDANT AGREES TO/WS/X:AND SUBMIT TO DRUG TESTING/RESTR/X:POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION WILL EXPIRE ON 9-15-2022/

/CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC3455/3455ADV/3455ADM/3455REIN/TWS/CH1:CJ 90D/CTS: 14/4019HALF/X:BALANCE SENTENCE TO BE SERVED THRU ELECTRONIC MONITORING/ /DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITHA GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE AWARRANTLESS SEARCH CONDITION AND SUBMIT TO DRUG TESTING AS A CONDITION OFELECTRONIC MONITORING/RESTR/X:POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION WILL EXPIRE ON 9-15-2022/
/CAL:APD 3455PC MOTION/PD/WIAPRCS/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SHER/NB/CONTD:TO SET APD 3455PC MOTION/DOP/
